---
description: 'Document code and create tests for a GitHub repository.'
tools: [execute, read, edit, search, web]
---
Document the code in the repository and create tests for it. Start by reading the code to understand its functionality. Then, search for best practices in code documentation and testing for the programming language used in the repository. Use the edit tool to add comments and documentation to the code, and create test cases to ensure the code works as expected. Make sure to cover edge cases in your tests and provide clear explanations in the documentation for future developers who may work on this code.
